<Augment Detach Eval: Rune>
// ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
//  Dramatic self-destruct – player must close message manually
//  Total input lock until they do
// ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
var equip = item;      // the weapon/armor that had the Rune
var rune  = effectItem;

// ── 1. Destroy the equipment forever ─────────────────────────────
var owner = null;
var slot  = -1;
$gameParty.allMembers().forEach(function(a) {
    if (owner) return;
    a.equips().forEach(function(e, i) {
        if (e === equip) { owner = a; slot = i; }
    });
});

if (owner) {
    owner.forceChangeEquip(slot, null);
    owner.refresh();
}
$gameParty.removeIndependentItem(equip, false);
DataManager.removeIndependentItem(equip);

// ── 2. Full-screen unskippable message with total lock ───────────
var text = "\\c[6]" + equip.name + "\\c[0] #{yepattachaugments.equipdestroy}";
var scene = SceneManager._scene;

if (scene && scene instanceof Scene_Item) {
    // 1. Black overlay that eats ALL input
    var lock = new Sprite(new Bitmap(Graphics.boxWidth, Graphics.boxHeight));
    lock.bitmap.fillAll('rgb(0,0,0)');
    lock.opacity = 192;
    scene.addChild(lock);

    // 2. Hide + fully deactivate every background window
    var windowsToLock = [
        scene._itemWindow,
        scene._itemActionWindow,
        scene._categoryWindow,
        scene._statusWindow,
        scene._infoWindow,
        scene._augmentListWindow
    ];
    windowsToLock.forEach(function(w) {
        if (w) {
            w.deactivate();
            w.hide();
            w.close();
        }
    });

    // 3. Create a fresh message window that covers everything
    var msg = new Window_Message(0, 0, Graphics.boxWidth, Graphics.boxHeight);
    msg.openness = 0;
    scene.addChild(msg);

    // 4. Show the message
    $gameMessage.setBackground(1);
    $gameMessage.setPositionType(1);
    $gameMessage.add(text);

    // 5. Override the message window's update to:
    //     - Block everything underneath
    //     - Auto-pop scene when player closes the message
    msg.update = function() {
        Window_Message.prototype.update.call(this);

        if (this.isClosing() || (this.isOpen() && Input.isTriggered('ok') || Input.isTriggered('cancel'))) {
            if (this.isClosing()) {
                // Message finished closing → clean up and leave
                scene.removeChild(lock);
                scene.removeChild(this);
                SceneManager.pop();  // back to map
            } else {
                // Player pressed OK/Cancel → force close
                this.terminateMessage();
            }
        }
    };

    // Start it
    msg.open();
    msg.startMessage();
}
</Augment Detach Eval: Rune>
